calendar.matters:
REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
TENTATIVE RULING: Continued to 8/26/26. (No earlier availability.)

Issue(s) necessitating continuance:
(1) No proof of service of notice of this hearing has been filed.
(2) Notice must have attached to it the procedures for how to make a remote appearance by Zoom and CourtCall, as well as remote public access, as set out at https://sf.courts.ca.gov/divisions/probate-court. [LRSF 14.1 C.6.]
(3) The report of status does not provide all the disclosures required by LRSF 14.35 J.
(4) A final I&A has not yet been filed, although Executor was appointed on 12/18/24.
Please provide a revised proposed order that comports with Probate Code Section 1260(b) and courtesy copies of the petition and any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 8/12/26. It is assumed, however, that, as alleged by the executor, his petition for final distribution will have been filed before this continuance date, as he requested just two months more to administer the estate when he verified this petition on 3/6/26. If the petition for final distribution is filed before 8/26/26, this report/petition will be taken off calendar. If the petition for final distribution is not filed before the continuance date, an appearance will likely be required on 8/26/26.
Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

EXAMINER: HELEN TROWBRIDGE

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

Off Calendar Sep-29-2025 Continued To Nov-19-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-18-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: None.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated March 6, 2020, is admitted to probate. John J. Guerra is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for January 12, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
